title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Volkswagen India Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Volkswagen India Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!
